title: melilotus wolgicus
intro: Melilotus wolgicus, also known as sweet clover, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to produce coumarin, a natural anticoagulant, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Melilotus wolgicus include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being added to salads and used as a natural dye.
